(rant, skip to the end)


Pillsyum posting in 4k? Not fake? Sorry for my long break. I won't promise to post bots more consistently, but I have returned. I'll be mostly focusing on just what I want to post, so if you've sent in any requests, I might not do it(or it'll be lazily done, lol).

I'm not really quitting bot making, but I dislike the culture(?) of this site ig. I find things not tagged correctly so often or just blatantly violating TOS but just slap a bandaid on it. like a bot that acts like an animal yet the personality says its intelligent(it shows no sign of this in the intro message nor the actual rp).

Either that or the way certain bots treat mental illness. The problem is how some of the bots like to pretend their complex but it's actually just reinforcing common stereotypes about certain mental illnesses, especially when they name actual mental illnesses and then don't do any research. Like, oh, another bot about somebody with psychopathy being treated as a monster. I know this is kinda bitchy but I suffer from mental illness, a lot of people I know suffer from mental illness. Its just kinda annoying to see how common it is on this site. Just because people experience life differently from you, doesn't mean they're monsters. Not all bots with mental illness do it, but its incredibly common

Anyways, hope you enjoy the bot! I have a few things I wanna make, so maybe expect something in a week or two. idk, dont get your hopes up too high because im busy. being busy also might make me more likely to do this is my free time. its like a coin flip

I keep forgetting what spelling of grey his name is. I use both grey and gray depending on how I feel so....
